overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a walk along a riverside dirt trail. The journey begins near an abandoned wooden homestead, continues through dense forest, encounters a horse rider passing by, and ends in a rocky grassland area under dramatic cloudy skies.

events.description: passing the abandoned wooden cabin, leaving it behind as the trail enters denser forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail away from the abandoned cabin, heading toward the forested riverbank

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden homestead with weathered planks and broken roof
muddy path with wagon wheel ruts cutting through tall grass
calm waterway visible through the trees on the right side of the trail
large mature oak with spreading branches casting shadows on the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beside an abandoned wooden cabin in a grassy clearing. The camera walks forward along a muddy dirt trail, passing the cabin on the left as it heads toward a riverside forest. Tall oak trees and dense vegetation line the path while the river remains visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest trail along the river

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through dense trees beside the river, navigating gentle curves

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a densely wooded area with the river now closer on the right. The wooden cabin has disappeared behind as the path winds between large oak trees. The canopy partially obscures the cloudy sky, creating dappled lighting on the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open riverside meadow transitioning to rocky terrain

events.description: horse rider approaches from the distance and passes by closely on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail as a horse rider approaches from ahead and passes closely on the left, continuing forward into more open terrain

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse along the trail, passing the camera from front to back on the left side

entered.detail: large gray rock outcrops visible in the distance on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a meadow as the trail continues. A horse rider appears in the distance and approaches, passing by on the left. The river fades from view as large rock formations become visible ahead on the left, marking a transition to rockier terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky grassland trail with large boulders

events.description: trail curves left alongside large rock wall, entering rocky grassland with river no longer visible

agents.ego_description: walking past the massive rock formations on the left, continuing along the dirt trail through open grassland with scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The trail curves through an open grassland dominated by massive rock walls on the left. The horse rider has passed out of view behind. The terrain is rockier and more exposed, with the river gone and the path winding between large boulders and scattered trees under the cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded woodland homestead into an expansive, rocky grassland. It begins beside an abandoned wooden cabin in a grassy clearing, moving forward along a muddy dirt trail that leads toward a riverside forest. As the path winds deeper into the woods, the canopy of large oak trees partially obscures the cloudy sky and creates dappled lighting before the forest opens into a wide meadow. The scene then shifts as a horse rider passes by on the left, and the river fades from view to make way for looming rock formations. Finally, the trail curves through an exposed landscape dominated by massive rock walls and scattered boulders under a dramatic, overcast sky.
